chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-4958 OF 2024 Abdul Majeed Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Misc. No.22019/24 2. For orders on office objection No.26 & 31. 3. For orders on Misc. No.22020/24 4. For orders on Misc. No.22021/24 5. For hearing of main case. Dated: 08.10.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Domki for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would like to withdraw this petition for filing the fresh one in the respective jurisdictions, which are being enjoyed by the respective benches/Circuit Courts etc. Petition is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
